items.name_en: (Prada) Moon/Crescent Bag Fashion Dark Horse[Victory] Calfskin with scattered letter gold hardware, deer pattern paired with fashion crocodile🐊pattern, more stylish. The crescent shape has a self-adjusting buckle, overall leather chain, can be sweet or salty. Shows elegance with a touch of retro. Side buckles can instantly turn it into a cute hula hoop, unlocking multi-use.

items.name_en: (Qixi Limited Edition) Bottega Veneta
items.name_cn:
(Qixi Limited Edition) Bottega Veneta
This Cassette woven cube bag is simple, chic, understated, and luxurious.
The latest version features a triangular logo pattern on the side! A very practical bag for commuting. The minimalist design combines BV's classic weaving art, making it very easy to match with everyday outfits. Every color is sophisticated, and the soft lambskin looks high-quality. Stylish and chic when worn.
Crossbody, shoulder, or clutch. Unisex.
Size: 23*15*5.5
Style No.: 80820#

items.name_en: (Small) DI0R Oblique 2019s Backpack
items.name_cn:
(Small) DI0R Oblique 2019s Backpack
A couple's style DI0R Oblique backpack. In addition to the vintage pattern, it features small metal logos, giving it a soft and cute look. The canvas material is very lightweight, has a large capacity, and is practical with a great appearance ~
The iconic oblique vintage print pattern has integrated into everyone's fashionable attitude~ Carrying vintage items makes you feel like you're at Paris Fashion Week wherever you go. Highly recommended🖤 for a couple's look
Large: 29×14×36 CM
Small: 23.5×11×32 CM
#088#510

items.name_en: (With full packaging)!!️【New】Ophidia Series Mini Shoulder Bag. This Ophidia series shoulder bag is crafted from GG Supreme canvas, injecting new life into a classic design. The bag comes with two removable shoulder straps, one chain and one leather, and is adorned with classic striped webbing elements and double G hardware. Beige and ebony GG Supreme canvas, oatmeal leather trim, gold-tone hardware, red and green striped webbing, oatmeal cotton-linen lining with double G, removable chain shoulder strap (15.5cm long); removable adjustable leather shoulder strap (height adjustable from 51.5cm to 58.5cm) Zipper closure, Weight: approx. 0.35kg.

This Ophidia series shoulder bag is crafted from GG Supreme canvas, injecting new life into a classic design. The bag comes with two removable shoulder straps, one chain and one leather, and is adorned with classic striped webbing elements and double G hardware. Beige and ebony GG Supreme canvas, oatmeal leather trim, gold-tone hardware, red and green striped webbing, beige cotton-linen lining with double G, removable chain shoulder strap (22cm long); removable adjustable leather shoulder strap (length adjustable between 50cm and 57cm) Zipper closure.
Model: 795194
Dimensions: 24✖️12✖️12cm
Color: Oatmeal/pvc
